title: Helsingborg Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Helsingborg, with a Z-Score of -3.51. This event has been categorized as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Helsingborg are extremely cold, with a significant impact on various sectors. 
 The city is experiencing a high number of heating degree days (HDD), with a value of 13.3 GG, indicating a high energy demand. 
 The relative humidity is at 57%, and the wind speed is moderate, at 10.1 km/h, which may exacerbate the cold conditions.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
